title: List of Electronic Filing Validations Errors and Warnings - Canada.ca
content:
## List of Electronic Filing Validations Errors and Warnings
The following table is intended to assist filers of information returns in understanding messages displayed in the Error Report during the filing process. When a message appears, it is recommended that the information return be carefully reviewed. Making corrections before submission is strongly advised to help ensure the successful processing of returns by the CRA.
There are three possible statuses (or scenarios) related to the messages that might be displayed. Please note that the status is not included in the error report.
- Reject: This means that if you proceed with the submission, the return will be rejected when processed by the CRA. It is recommended that in these cases, you cancel your submission, correct the error, and then resubmit.
- Review: This message indicates there is a possibility that the return may be rejected upon CRA review. If the return is rejected, the CRA will contact the filer. We recommend reviewing the return for the specified error before submitting.
- Warning: This message indicates that the issue should be reviewed to ensure the submission is accurate as intended. These messages will not cause the return to be rejected once processed by the CRA.
This paginated table is initially sorted by CRA Code . You can also sort by Message , Applicable Return Type , or Status . You can also filter the list by entering any part of a message's content or specific return type in the Filter items field.
Plan identification number on one or more slips does not match the plan identification number reported on the summary.
TFSA, T4FHSA, RRSP, T215
There is a missing or invalid, calendar year end fair market value.
One or more slips under the same plan number have the same contract number. Contract numbers must be unique.
Multiple slips are missing mandatory fields. The following fields must be filled out for the TFSA the holder's social insurance number (SIN), surname, and date of birth, as well as the account's calendar year end fair market value. for the T4FHSA the account's calendar year end fair market value.
- for the TFSA the holder's social insurance number (SIN), surname, and date of birth, as well as the account's calendar year end fair market value.
- for the T4FHSA the account's calendar year end fair market value.
The total financial amounts reported in the summary do not equal the total financial amounts calculated by the system.
Out of balance - slip count reported is more or less than slip count calculated by the system.
Out of balance - financial amounts reported on the summary are greater or less than the financial totals calculated by the system.
Multiple slips with errors. If the transaction date is present, then the financial field must be present. If the financial field is present, then the transaction date must be present.
The plan number is missing or invalid. The plan number must exist in the CRA's database.
TFSA, PRPP, RRSP, T4FHSA, T215
The fiscal period end date is invalid.
Partner code 5 is valid only for 2015 and later tax years.
Negative amounts were detected within financial field codes 222, 223, 224, 225, 241, 242, 243, or 244.
The code entered in the financial details field is invalid for the tax year.
The total number of transactions reported on the slip does not match the total number of transactions calculated.
Report type code on identification record does not match report type code on disposition.
An amount in Box 21, "Proceeds of disposition or settlement amount," is negative, and the code in Box 15, "Type of securities," is not FUT or OPC.
The securities code ELN was entered in box 15, and the tax year is 2015 or earlier.
The recipient type code is 2, and there is no information about a second recipient.
A value was entered in a field which does not apply to the tax year in the summary.
The fair market value field is mandatory for 2023 and later tax years.
A value was entered in a field which does not apply to the tax year in the summary.
Information was entered in box 35, \"Transfers on marriage or common-law relationship breakdown,\" and the tax year is before 2002; or information was entered in box 37, \"Advanced life deferred annuity purchase,\" and the tax year is before 2020.
Duplicate USN on two or more original slips.
Total transaction amounts calculated by the system do not equal the total transaction amounts reported on the slip.
Value present in a field which does not apply to the reported taxation year.
The employment insurance benefit repayment rate is invalid. The rate must be 000, 030, 050, 060, 070, 080, 090, or 100.
Federal or non-resident tax reported does not align with type of filer account number reported.
Value present in a field which does not apply to the reported taxation year.
Value entered in a field which does not apply to the reported taxation year.
Missing or invalid formatting in social insurance number field.
T4, T4A(OAS), PRPP, RRSP, T215, T2202, T4RIF, T4RSP, T5007
The employer-offered dental benefits indicator is reported on one or more slips, and the tax year is before 2023.
Missing or invalid formatting in recipient first name.
T4, PRPP, RRSP, T215, T2202, T4RIF, T4RSP, T5007
Value entered in a field which does not apply to the reported taxation year.
The investment tax credit code is invalid for the tax year.
The trust account number is linked to another account. Make sure you are using the correct account number.
Tax year on the summary does not match the year in the trust end date.
Value present in a field which does not apply to the reported taxation year.
Box 41 present but missing ITC code or ITC code present but missing box 41.
Mandatory fields are missing or invalid on multiple slips. Mandatory fields include session periods the number of months of full-time and part-time study school type These fields must be completed in line with the published CRA specifications. The errors may include the period of full-time study or the period of part-time study exceeds 12 months the school type is 5 and is missing the flying school or club indicator (the value must be 1 through 6) the start and end dates of the session period do not match the summary year
- the number of months of full-time and part-time study
- the period of full-time study or the period of part-time study exceeds 12 months
- the school type is 5 and is missing the flying school or club indicator (the value must be 1 through 6)
- the start and end dates of the session period do not match the summary year
The session period start or session period end is missing, incomplete, or invalid.
The school type is 5, and the flying school or club field does not have a value of 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, or 6.
The number of months of part-time and full-time must be entered.
Report type code on one or more slips is missing or does not correspond to the report type code on the summary.
Part XVIII, Part XIX
Duplicate Reporting Financial Institution Document Reference Identifier - Must be unique.
Part XVIII, Part XIX
Duplicate document reference identifier on the slip - Must be unique.

Invalid date of birth on the slip.

Part XVIII, Part XIX
Duplicate sponsor document reference identifier - Must be unique.
Corrected Document Reference Identifier for sponsor is invalid.
Corrected Document Reference Identifier for sponsor is invalid.
Organization taxation identification number for an organization is missing or invalid on the slip.
The global intermediary identification number contains invalid formatting.
The global intermediary identification number contains invalid formatting.
Country code is missing or invalid for a sponsor.
Missing or invalid Document Type Code.

Invalid taxation year for filer category reported.
Invalid taxation year for account holder type code.
Invalid client account number type code.
Both Taxation Identification Number (TIN) and No TIN Reason code are missing.
Financial Institution Identification Number does not match Account number on the summary.

A negative value is not allowed for the financial field.
Income code 88 (old age security recovery tax) reported incorrectly.
Invalid currency code.
The income code or exemption code entered for the tax year in the summary is invalid.
Gross income is missing on the slip.
The business account number is linked to another account. Make sure you are using the correct account number for the successor or predecessor for the tax year of the return.
AGR-1, T4, T4A, T4A-NR, T1204, T4RIF, T4RSP, T5, T5007, T5008, T5013, T5018, T4A(OAS), T4A(P), T4E, SAFER, RRSP, TFSA, PRPP, RRSP and RRIF NQI, Part XVIII, Part XIX, T2202, T4FHSA
The program account number type is invalid for the return type being filed.
AGR-1, T4, T4A, T4A-NR, T1204, T4RIF, T4RSP, T5, T5007, T5008, T5013, T5018, T4A(OAS), T4A(P), T4E, SAFER, RRSP, TFSA, PRPP, RRSP and RRIF NQI, Part XVIII, Part XIX, T2202, T4FHSA
The account number on the summary is invalid for this type of return. The account number must be in the correct format for the type of return being filed. It must exist in the CRA's database and must not be closed.
AGR-1, NR4, T3, T4, T4A, T4A-NR, T1204, T4RIF, T4RSP, T5, T5007, T5008, T5013, T5018, T4A(OAS), T4A(P), T4E, SAFER, RRSP, TFSA, PRPP, RRSP and RRIF NQI, Part XVIII, Part XIX, T2202, T4FHSA
